'''zazhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibacitabin|ibacitabin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibacitabin|ibacitabin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zazhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzhimith|zæzhimith]] || [[word:zæzhimij|zæzhimij]] || [[word:zæzhimish|zæzhimish]] || [[word:zæzhimi|zæzhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhuzhumuth|zazhuzhumuth]] || [[word:zazhuzhumuj|zazhuzhumuj]] || [[word:zazhuzhumush|zazhuzhumush]] || [[word:zazhuzhumu|zazhuzhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhumuth|zazhumuth]] || [[word:zazhumuj|zazhumuj]] || [[word:zazhumush|zazhumush]] || [[word:zazhumu|zazhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhufmufth|zazhufmufth]] || [[word:zazhufmufj|zazhufmufj]] || [[word:zazhufmufsh|zazhufmufsh]] || [[word:zazhufmuf|zazhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhumuthu|zazhumuthu]] || [[word:zazhumuju|zazhumuju]] || [[word:zazhumushu|zazhumushu]] || [[word:zazhumuku|zazhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhumuth|zazhumuth]] || [[word:zazhumuj|zazhumuj]] || [[word:zazhumush|zazhumush]] || [[word:zazhumu|zazhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhumuthul|zazhumuthul]] || [[word:zazhumujul|zazhumujul]] || [[word:zazhumushul|zazhumushul]] || [[word:zazhumukul|zazhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhumuuthuthu|zazhumuuthuthu]] || [[word:zazhumuujuju|zazhumuujuju]] || [[word:zazhumuushushu|zazhumuushushu]] || [[word:zazhumuuku|zazhumuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhumuthun|zazhumuthun]] || [[word:zazhumujun|zazhumujun]] || [[word:zazhumushun|zazhumushun]] || [[word:zazhumukun|zazhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhumuthuoro|zazhumuthuoro]] || [[word:zazhumujuoro|zazhumujuoro]] || [[word:zazhumushuoro|zazhumushuoro]] || [[word:zazhumukuoro|zazhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
